sources.name: openai-skills
sources.why: Official Codex skills catalog; useful as the baseline format and install source for Codex-compatible skills.

sources.name: ok-skills
sources.why: Curated SKILL.md and AGENTS.md playbooks with planning, browser automation, docs lookup, GitHub Actions debugging, and document workflows.

sources.name: awesome-agent-skills
sources.why: Large curated index for finding targeted skills such as GitOps, accessibility audits, SAST, JavaScript testing, and agent modes.

sources.name: skills-supply
sources.why: Cross-agent skill dependency model using agents.toml; useful for future sync/install automation across Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode.

sources.name: jdrhyne-agent-skills
sources.why: Includes Codex-specific skills, self-improving-agent, knowledge graph, skill-sync, todo tracking, and universal skills.

sources.name: alirezarezvani-claude-skills
sources.why: Large multi-platform Claude/Codex/Gemini-compatible skill and plugin library spanning engineering, DevOps, product, PM, compliance, and executive roles.

sources.name: anthropic-quickstarts
sources.why: Anthropic examples and workflow commands useful for Claude-oriented git and task automation.

sources.name: qodo-skills
sources.why: Testing and quality-focused skill source for unit, integration, and review workflows.

sources.name: claude-code-base-action
sources.why: Claude automation examples useful for PR review, reports, and CI-style agent workflows.

sources.name: context7
sources.why: Version-aware documentation lookup source for research and token-saving workflows.
